asset_name: Scale Assembly with Dual Platforms and Pivot (504x48 static)
shared_properties: The assembly encodes two 240x16 px platforms and one 24x48 px center pivot inside a single 504x48 px composition.
Core palette metadata remains primary #C9A84C, background #0D0B14, and accent #D4682A while support-shadow tones stay inside specs.colors_hex.
Gold trim stays symmetrical so load differences read through object placement rather than decoration.
differences: The center pivot is heavier and brighter than the platforms to communicate the torque fulcrum.
Platform top surfaces include a 4 px contact strip and a darker underside for readable footing at shallow and steep tilt angles.
Small engraved tick marks appear every 32 px to support grid-aware placement of Umbra, Echo, and weight blocks.

reference_images.label: gdd_markdown
reference_images.purpose: Grounds scale dimensions, torque-play framing, and platform contact geometry.

reference_images.label: moodboard
reference_images.purpose: Grounds the gold engineering language used by tower machinery.

reference_images.label: umbra_character
reference_images.purpose: Grounds player and Echo placement scale against the balance assembly.

bevy_constraints.bundle_strategy: SpriteBundle with runtime rotation on child platform transforms.
bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load the scale assembly texture during FloorLoading and register it for ScaleAssembly roots.
runtime_notes: Author the texture in a neutral level pose and rotate platform children around the pivot according to torque results.
Keep tick marks aligned to 32 px intervals.
Render world geometry behind Umbra and Echo silhouettes while keeping pivot trim visible under beam overlays.

context.usage: Primary weight-torque assembly used to open routes and unlock exit doors when target tilt thresholds are reached.

construction_notes: Pivot body width is 24 px and height is 48 px.
Right platform width is 240 px with mirrored trim balance.

acceptance_criteria: Scale assembly texture is exactly 504x48 px and clearly separates two 240x16 platforms from the center pivot.
Top contact strips remain readable under moderate tilt and do not merge into the darker underside.
32 px placement ticks are visible without overpowering the core gold-and-shadow silhouette.
